# terrible_cisco_dnac_wireless_accespoint_configuration (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `adminStatus` (Boolean) Configure the access point's admin status. Set this parameter's value to "true" to enable it and "false" to disable it.
- `apList` (String) Wireless Accespoint Configuration's apList.
- `apMode` (Number) Configure the access point's mode for local/flexconnect mode, set "0"; for monitor mode, set "1"; for sniffer mode, set "4"; and for bridge/flex+bridge mode, set "5".
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `configureAdminStatus` (Boolean) To change the access point's admin status, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `configureApMode` (Boolean) To change the access point's mode, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `configureFailoverPriority` (Boolean) To change the access point's failover priority, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `configureHAController` (Boolean) To change the access point's HA controller, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `configureLedBrightnessLevel` (Boolean) To change the access point's LED brightness level, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `configureLedStatus` (Boolean) To change the access point's LED status, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `configureLocation` (Boolean) To change the access point's location, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `failoverPriority` (Number) Configure the acess point's failover priority for low, set "1"; for medium, set "2"; for high, set "3"; and for critical, set "4".
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `isAssignedSiteAsLocation` (Boolean) If AP is assigned to a site, then to assign AP location as the site name, set this parameter's value to "true".
- `ledBrightnessLevel` (Number) Configure the access point's LED brightness level by setting a value between 1 and 8.
- `ledStatus` (Boolean) Configure the access point's LED status. Set "true" to enable its status and "false" to disable it.
- `location` (String) Configure the access point's location.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `primaryControllerName` (String) Configure the hostname for an access point's primary controller.
- `primaryIpAddress` (String) Wireless Accespoint Configuration's primaryIpAddress.
- `radioConfigurations` (String) Wireless Accespoint Configuration's radioConfigurations.
- `secondaryControllerName` (String) Configure the hostname for an access point's secondary controller.
- `secondaryIpAddress` (String) Wireless Accespoint Configuration's secondaryIpAddress.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tertiaryControllerName` (String) Configure the hostname for an access point's tertiary controller.
- `tertiaryIpAddress` (String) Wireless Accespoint Configuration's tertiaryIpAddress.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
